finding_results.notes: Priya now pairs immediate safety support with explicit downstream costs (interference risk, school transfer burden, and real cash loss), and the prior absolution line is replaced by a warning that practical conflict intensifies tomorrow.

The close now contains an unresolved present-tense logistical and financial consequence (missing MetroCard with insufficient fare), and the final beat frames continuing rupture instead of a stabilized boundary win.

Raised contraction density in Ravi/Anika pressure dialogue (we'll, don't, wasn't, didn't, I'm) and rewrote Priya's 351-387 stretch away from consecutive legalistic declaratives into a boundary-focused colloquial cadence while keeping specificity.

Rebuilt refusal cadence so each beat shifts leverage: agreement breach (87/105), relational boundary (167), bodily limit (171), and exit consequence (191). Removed standalone one-word refusal lines in the 83-191 window.
Replaced recurring negation-contrast scaffolds in all targeted spans with affirmative sensory/action phrasing while preserving scene meaning and pressure.
Converted motive-summary interpretation into observable behavior and sensory cues (speech rhythm, grip shift, body stall, breath pattern) so motive remains inferential.
Limited each targeted beat to a single explicit numeric/logistical anchor and added non-numeric stress responses (somatic memory, freezing/handling behavior, cold-pain physical reaction).

pass_summaries.summary: Revised the refuge and ending architecture to keep consequence active: safety enforcement now coexists with custody, school, relational, and money fallout, and the chapter ends on unresolved cost rather than closure.
All packet findings for the dialogue/idiolect/cadence pass were resolved in chapter 13 with targeted register, cadence, and leverage-beat revisions while preserving continuity constraints.

All packet findings for the prose/copyedit pass were resolved with targeted line-level rewrites that preserve continuity and voice while reducing formulaic negation, removing interpretive motive labels, and diversifying stress expression.
